mainEntity.name: How does California bar rules affect AEO for LA lawyers?
mainEntity.text: How does California bar rules affect AEO for LA lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: California bar rules require truthful claims in AEO content; avoid guarantees, disclose AI optimizations, and ensure E-E-A-T aligns with ethical advertising.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Rule 7.1 mandates no misleading AI content; LA firms must attribute sources and avoid 'best lawyer' hype in question answers. Non-compliance risks sanctions. Consult bar before schema claims. Regulators monitor AI outputs closely.[1]

name: CA Bar Rules Impact on LA AEO
description: California bar rules require truthful claims in AEO content; avoid guarantees, disclose AI optimizations, and ensure E-E-A-T aligns with ethical advertising.[3]
